title: Centre sets 15 June as cut-off date to decide new playbook to contain inflation due to fuel price hike, monsoon concerns
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Centre has set June 15 as the deadline to finalize a new strategic plan.
*   This "playbook" is designed to contain rising inflation.
*   The primary drivers of this inflation are fuel price hikes and concerns regarding the upcoming monsoon.

title: Iran secretly bought Chinese satellite tech via UAE — then struck Abu Dhabi: Report
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Iran secretly acquired Chinese satellite technology.
*   The acquisition was facilitated through the United Arab Emirates (UAE).
*   This reportedly occurred before Iran launched a strike on Abu Dhabi, according to a new report.

title: Former Kerala Chief Electoral Officer Rathan U. Kelkar takes charge as Secretary to CM Satheesan
content:
Rathan U. Kelkar has taken charge as the Secretary to Chief Minister Satheesan.
*   He previously held the position of Kerala's Chief Electoral Officer.
*   This marks his new appointment to a key administrative role within the Chief Minister's office.

title: Digital arrest: Six held for duping former teacher in Bengaluru of ₹24 crore
content:
Six individuals have been arrested in Bengaluru.
*   They are accused of duping a former teacher using a 'digital arrest' scam.
*   The victim lost a massive sum of ₹24 crore.

title: Plea in Supreme Court to probe Cockroach Janta Party ‘activities’, fake law degrees
content:
A plea has been filed in the Supreme Court.
*   The plea requests a probe into the 'activities' of the 'Cockroach Janta Party'.
*   It also seeks an investigation into allegations concerning fake law degrees.
